feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Heat and Numbers
entry.summary:
Author: frogonadollar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: A heatwave induced by Earth's yellow sun has Clark supercharged and delirious beyond belief. The only one he can think of to help him is his best friend and long time crush brilliant, billionaire Bruce Wayne. - It’s too hot, so hot, Clark needs to get his suit off right this instant. He kicks at his boots before pressing the crest on his chest. The whole thing slinks back in and condenses, he puts the charm on the metal table beside him and feels like he can finally breathe. He’s only slightly panting. The room glows red, the monitors brightness the only light unaffected. He feels what he thinks is best closely described as drunk. Or delirious. Whichever shoe fits. The haze over his mind is slowly starting to fade. It’s only when Bruce enters the room that he’s felt any sense of clarity since this morning. Except now, he’s naked. In front of Bruce.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A brief story of how Tim Drake was outed as a pervert, and eventually cleared his name, to a certain extent.
entry.summary:
Author: CertifiedNightwingLover

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,187Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 31

Summary: One thing leads to another and Tim ends up with a Batman X Superman fanfiction on his screen. Everything's fine, until it isn't. That being, Bruce walks in on him reading said fanfiction. Bruce's interest is piqued and he reads the fanfiction, for safety reasons. Now, Bruce probably thinks Tim is a pervert, given that he can't even stare him in the eye. And Bruce...he has a lot on his mind.

entry.title: [PODFIC] Consanguineous Ministrations
entry.summary:
Author: Demon_Sab

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 178Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Written by Briarwitched, and read by Demon_Sab. “Who gave you a baby?” Dick demanded, the instant Bruce opened the front door, eyes drawn immediately to the sobbing infant on Bruce’s hip that he gently bounced to no avail. At the same time, Bruce muttered, “I told you, it’s fine, you didn’t have to come.” Dick rolled his eyes and pushed past him. Noted the scattered blankets, baby clothing, and dirty dishes gracing nearly every surface of the lake house with a glance. “I figured that out when you hung up on me. My question still stands: who in their right mind gave you an infant?” Bruce opened his mouth and then shut it. Took a deep breath which he blew out slowly. The plain white dress shirt he favored on the weekends was streaked with what looked like pea puree, sweet potato, and snot. “A desperate alien ship with no other options.” “Yeah, that scans.” ---- Alternatively titled, "Let's give Batfleck alien baby problems".

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Honeybee
entry.summary:
Author: turqu0ise

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,772Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 51

Summary: Clark is asexual. Even without knowing this, Bruce assumes the man who doesn’t need to breathe air would be the best candidate to help with a sex pollen problem. Turns out he was wrong, and Clark comes under the effect of the pollen anyway—just not the way Bruce would have expected. COMPLETED: CHAPTER TWO WILL BE UPLOADED LATER TODAY

entry.title: Let The Soft Animal Of Your Body (Love What It Loves)
entry.summary:
Author: m0ld7igma

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,247Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 7

Summary: Conner Kent dies with Tim Drake’s name still dawdling in his mouth.After that, the world keeps ending in smaller ways.Tim starts stealing from Cadmus. Bruce starts looking at him like he’s an active bomb. Dick keeps trying to pull him back towards earth. Somewhere between grief and devotion and something unbearably close to love, Tim decides death is a problem that can be solved.The terrible thing is that he’s just smart enough to almost do it.

entry.title: Beneath the Rubble
entry.summary:
Author: Gravytrain101

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,695Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Clark attends a Wayne Foundation gala as both a reporter and Bruce Wayne’s husband, expecting nothing more dangerous than speeches and wealthy donors. The night turns catastrophic when armed protestors storm the event and threaten to kill everyone inside. Forced to protect innocent people without exposing himself as Batman, Bruce quietly risks himself over and over while Superman desperately tries to deescalate the situation. When the building explodes, Clark manages to save dozens of people—but not Bruce. Buried beneath the rubble and bleeding badly, Bruce is finally found by his terrified husband, who carries him home to Wayne Manor where Alfred helps stitch the Dark Knight back together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,528Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 736

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,881Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 171

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,467Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: It's the Camping Experience!
entry.summary:
Author: 518Crows

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,400Chapters: 2/18Kudos: 94

Summary: “You know what?” Kal said, mischief gleaming far too brightly in his eyes. “How about this? I dare you guys to go camping my way. No air mattresses. No pre-made meals. No Wi-Fi. None of the million-dollar equipment in front of me.” Bruce watched every single one of his kids perk up with interest. ‘Shit.’ Not one of them would ever back down from a dare. His jaw clenched. “Kal-El,” He said again, sharper this time. Before he could step in and shut it down, Kal opened his mouth and sealed their fate. “I bet you can’t do it.” Anger surged through Bruce as determination flared in his children’s eyes. He saw Damian puff up, ready to- “I accep-” “Clark. Joseph. Kent.” The effect was immediate. Kal’s victorious grin vanished as he snapped his head toward Bruce. The room fell silent. Kal straightened, then unconsciously hunched as he walked toward him, like a chastened kid called to the principal’s office.-The Bat family plans a camping trip—something Bruce is absolutely dreading. To make matters worse, they invite Clark, Superman, his very new boyfriend. Boy, are they in for a ride. I mean, who could have known that the man was a camping enthusiast?

entry.title: Who the hell is Nightwing?
entry.summary:
Author: acebagle

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,079Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 702

Summary: "I would like to propose Nightwing. He is an-" "No." Batman interjected. "Batman, if you would allow me to finish my nomination then we may move on to the discussion." Diana said. "No. Nightwing will not be joining the Justice League." Batman stated, with a rigidity to his shoulders that Hal had rarely seen outside of a crisis. --- When Nightwing joins the Justice League Hal Jordan doesn't know what to make of him. Despite his easy-going personality Hal can sense deeper troubles underneath the surface and with his identity as secretive as Batman's its hard to get a clear picture. He seems to know far too much about their local Bat and is far to intimate to be 'just friends' with Roy. Or, seven times Hal Jordan is confused about Nightwing's relationship with his fellow League members and one time that he understands.
